creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Apr 26 18:13:14 2014
New Revision: 352320
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352320
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352320/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/188346
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Builder/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Builder/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Builder/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:13:09 2014	(r352319)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Builder/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:13:14 2014	(r352320)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl module intended to make it easier to create reusable web apps
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-IO-Util>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-IO-Util \
 		p5-OOTools>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-OOTools
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
